ham: Hello, this is a reminder from Greenfield Society that your maintenance fee of INR 1500 is due on 30th April 2026. Please pay by 28th April to avoid late charges. For details, visit <URL> or call 1234567890.
spam: ⚡️URGENT⚡️ Your electricity bill for account 123456 is due. If not paid by 30th Apr, service will be disconnected TONIGHT. Pay NOW to avoid outage: <URL> Call 9876543210. ACT FAST!!!
